storyboard.content: I am having severe crushing chest pain right now.
The pain spreads to both of my shoulders and up into my jaw.
I feel like I cannot breathe — I am short of breath.
I am soaking wet with sweat and I feel extremely nauseous.
This came on suddenly about an hour ago and it is getting worse.
The pain is a 10 out of 10. I feel like I might be dying and I am close to passing out.
I am a 60-year-old woman with type 2 diabetes, high blood pressure, and I smoke. My doctor has always told me I am at high risk for heart problems.
